'''AX-456''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Barma sector/Legends|Barma sector]].

==History==
The [[AX system]] had been surveyed by scouts as well as droids millennia before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but it remained lifeless and unexploitable during the years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. It was during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Civil War]] when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] noticed that the system was both near the sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Dakshee]], as well as the sector's frontier to [[Haldeen sector/Legends|Haldeen]] and the [[Kliap sector/Legends|Kliap sectors]], so it would make an ideal location for a secret [[Relay station/Legends|relay station]] for transmitting both to the capital, and other Rebel bases.

According to the [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] its purpose was to transmit intelligence and [[Propaganda/Legends|psyprop]]. In reality AX-456 was one of the stations disseminating information, stories and coverage of the Empire's atrocities, showing the truth to the Imperial citizens, and gaining sympathy and support.

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] the Rebels started constructing the base while most of the world and personnel were underground. While they were half complete, Imperial [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] scouted the activities. By two weeks later, the installations were complete.

The comm center was wiped out by Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] led by [[Kyle Katarn]]. It was here that the cadet Katarn first met [[Jan Ors]] and spared her life. Four hundred thirty-six Rebels, and all but six of a platoon of stormtroopers, died in the fighting. Although Katarn's troops suffered heavy casualties, and Katarn himself was seriously wounded, he emerged victorious and was celebrated as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hero. During his graduation ceremony at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Military Academy at Cliffside]], Katarn was awarded the [[Medal of Valor/Legends|Medal of Valor]] by [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] for his actions during the [[Battle of AX-456]].

==Base structure==
The surface had a comm dish and a landing pad while most of the base was underground. Constructed hastily, the installations had a raw, improvised look.

The entrance of the base was a boxlike standard prefab structure, a massive affair built to withstand [[Meteorite/Legends|meteorite]] hits. The door was set into quick-drying [[permacrete]], and unlocked by a number pad. Next to it was an obvious camera, as well as a hidden tiny pinhead lens. The metallic door led to two [[Airlock/Legends|airlocks]], the second being a backup in case the first was destroyed by a meteor. The first room after the locks opened to an underground corridor dug by a [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miner]], branching to other passages. A businesslike rough-hewn corridor, covered by an electronic [[message board]]s, printouts and equipment racks, branched off to a cafeteria and cavelike storage rooms, up to a door leading to the Comm Room, full of monitors and related gear.

Along with the personnel, the corridors were populated by several [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and other machinery: [[Crawler (vehicle)|crawlers]], heavy-duty [[Construction droid/Legends|construction droids]], spidery [[freight loader]]s, [[A-type]]s, and [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 units]].
